TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Dawu mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 62.59 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 5.7 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 43.47 km¬≤), 4,435 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,781 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,151 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 71%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Dawu ays psgayun 5 ru 10 alang. 10 alang hani ga, Pangwi , Qaljapang , Ru ja qas , Pacavalj , Ku shu shu , Qu chn.la love vn , Tjacupu , Tjukuvulj , Seqeciin , Seqalapit .
S.PHON: *awu mki s~…ēku taituŇč. s~…ēu Ēunun kwara …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km* (rńßjan rinpaŇč …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a *.* km*, rr Ēan ńßjan …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km*), *,*** ńßi ku s~…ēu Ēunun kwara alaŇč ńßi kja, *,*** ő≤uwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *,*** ńßi, kjala kwara pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ē Ēuli …£a **%. kwara s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a tajwaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin na pajwan ku s~…ēmrrńßu ku pjux s~…ē Ēuli taja kja. ajs~…ē ptjaw s~…ēeő≤u *awu ajs~…ē ps~…ē…£ajun * ru ** alaŇč. ** alaŇč ńßani …£a, paŇčwi , qaljapaŇč , ru ja qas~…ē , pa ¶~ ®a*alj , ku s~…ēńßu s~…ēńßu , qu ¶~ ®ńßn.la lo*e *n , tja ¶~ ®upu , tjuku*ulj , s~…ēeqe ¶~ ®iin , s~…ēeqalapit .
S.FORM: Dawu mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 62.59 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 5.7 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 43.47 km¬≤), 4,435 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,781 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,151 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 71%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Dawu ays psgayun 5 ru 10 alang. 10 alang hani ga, Pangwi , Qaljapang , Ru ja qas , Pacavalj , Ku shu shu , Qu chn.la love vn , Tjacupu , Tjukuvulj , Seqeciin , Seqalapit .
S.PHON: *awu mki s~…ēku taituŇč. s~…ēu Ēunun kwara …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km* (rńßjan rinpaŇč …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a *.* km*, rr Ēan ńßjan …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km*), *,*** ńßi ku s~…ēu Ēunun kwara alaŇč ńßi kja, *,*** ő≤uwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *,*** ńßi, kjala kwara pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ē Ēuli …£a **%. kwara s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a tajwaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin na pajwan ku s~…ēmrrńßu ku pjux s~…ē Ēuli taja kja. ajs~…ē ptjaw s~…ēeő≤u *awu ajs~…ē ps~…ē…£ajun * ru ** alaŇč. ** alaŇč ńßani …£a, paŇčwi , qaljapaŇč , ru ja qas~…ē , pa ¶~ ®a*alj , ku s~…ēńßu s~…ēńßu , qu ¶~ ®ńßn.la lo*e *n , tja ¶~ ®upu , tjuku*ulj , s~…ēeqe ¶~ ®iin , s~…ēeqalapit .
